questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if Equans and CV Services Group are close competitors and there are not many alternatives, or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Equans and/or CV Services Group.
